creator: asb@hekropet.com.ua
text:
connect USB flash drive (transcend jetflash with switch read only on / R/o off) via USB, swith on flash - R/O on -

Oct 30 12:20:04 ra kernel: umass0: JetFlash TS256MJF2A, rev 2.00/1.00, addr 2
Oct 30 12:20:04 ra kernel: da0 at umass-sim0 bus 0 target 0 lun 0
Oct 30 12:20:04 ra kernel: da0: <JetFlash TS256MJF2A 1.00> Removable Direct Access SCSI-2 device 
Oct 30 12:20:04 ra kernel: da0: 40.000MB/s transfers
Oct 30 12:20:04 ra kernel: da0: 248MB (508000 512 byte sectors: 64H 32S/T 248C)

all correct.

try to mount  -

#mount -t msdos /dev/da0s1 /mnt

Oct 30 12:21:04 ra kernel: (da0:umass-sim0:0:0:0): WRITE(10). CDB: 2a 0 0 0 0 40 0 0 8 0 
Oct 30 12:21:04 ra kernel: (da0:umass-sim0:0:0:0): CAM Status: SCSI Status Error
Oct 30 12:21:04 ra kernel: (da0:umass-sim0:0:0:0): SCSI Status: Check Condition
Oct 30 12:21:04 ra kernel: (da0:umass-sim0:0:0:0): DATA PROTECT asc:27,0

Oct 30 12:21:04 ra kernel: (da0:umass-sim0:0:0:0): Unretryable error

Oct 30 12:21:04 ra kernel: (da0:umass-sim0:0:0:0): WRITE(10). CDB: 2a 0 0 0 0 40 0 0 8 0

Oct 30 12:21:04 ra kernel: g_vfs_done():da0s1[WRITE(offset=4096, length=4096)]error = 13

Oct 30 12:21:04 ra kernel: 0xc2fc9990: tag devfs, type VCHR

Oct 30 12:21:04 ra kernel: 
Oct 30 12:21:04 ra kernel: dev da0s1

after this system reboot. 
try this on other 2 PC with same effect.
if flash swith R/O off - no this problem.
thanks...
